template_variables.active_constraints:
1. The Governed Stream is lossless. All execution trace content — reasoning steps, self-corrections, tool call invocations, tool results — is captured in full regardless of what subset is used for any given downstream purpose. (Authority 7, source: 55a61a95-64fd-475b-a985-7962936fb07e)
2. No governing constraint may be truncated silently. Governing constraints (Authority Level 6+) are always delivered in full via the stdin directive channel. (Authority 7, source: b680da1d-f6d6-4113-ab4d-1a166154aff7)
3. Prompt Templates use namespace prefixing ([JC:] and [P:]) and separate context scopes at all times. (Authority 7, source: a67d4502-972e-4c08-b482-19fbc402a5e9)
4. All Artifacts are owned by JanumiCode and stored in the Governed Stream database. (Authority 7, source: a1030128-7334-4d7a-8ae9-8900de3c2993)
5. The Governed Stream is single-threaded. No parallel Workflow Runs in a Workspace. (Authority 7, source: 5c77f777-a698-405b-9881-b6813ae04ec5)
6. Agents never exercise judgment. Judgment is always escalated to the human. (Authority 7, source: b3e3ec17-574d-4915-99a2-244e0e71639e)
7. Every human interaction is recorded in the Governed Stream in full detail. (Authority 7, source: d7f5ea89-7265-4416-847f-348290ea28a2)
8. Every Phase Gate requires human approval. No automated gate passage. (Authority 7, source: ba84c364-c2f2-4a63-86ff-f3a49aba6c19)
9. Every phase is mandatory and executed in order. The Orchestrator cannot skip phases. (Authority 7, source: 0450a160-f9ec-4e41-ab94-188f37bf1794)
10. 100% correctness and completeness — always. All three layers of correctness (Section 1.6) are required. (Authority 7, source: 4394e1a8-f6d1-42c0-a25c-7991e6d02a5e)
template_variables.functional_requirements_summary:
[Release 1] NFR-001-D-001 [high] (Tier D leaf under NFR-001): As a system, I want to Monitor redirect endpoint latency P95 via Prometheus histograms under nominal load, so that System P95 latency remains ≤ 100 ms verified against the rolling 5-minute window.
[Release 1] US-001-C1-1 [critical] (Tier D leaf under US-001): As a CAM operator, I want to validate and reject request, so that Malicious or invalid requests are blocked before processing.
[Release 1] FR-002-001.1 [critical] (Tier D leaf under US-002): As a System, I want to Perform successful mapping lookup for valid slug, so that Return encrypted payload metadata and target destination.
[Release 2] NFR-AVAIL-002-D-001 [high] (Tier D leaf under NFR-002): As a system, I want to verify monthly uptime for redirect endpoint including planned maintenance is verified via synthetic probes, so that Verified uptime ≥ 99.9% over rolling 30-day windows; maintenance windows excluded per policy.
template_variables.implementation_plan_summary:
22 Implementation Tasks:
  task-link-repo-lookup-endpoint [medium]: Create the API endpoint that performs a lookup on the mappings table for a given slug, returning the encrypted payload metadata and the target destination URL.
    Component: comp-link-mapping-repository, Responsibility: Performs successful mapping lookup for valid slug, returning encrypted payload metadata and target destination.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Requests with a valid slug return the encrypted target destination in the response body; Requests with an invalid or missing slug return HTTP 404
  task-link-repo-encryption-layer [high]: Implement the logic to store original URLs encrypted at rest using the AES-256 cipher suite, ensuring zero plaintext occurrence in direct reads from the database.
    Component: comp-link-mapping-repository, Responsibility: Stores original URLs encrypted at rest using AES-256 cipher suite with zero plaintext occurrence in direct reads.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: All new URL records in the database are stored as encrypted blobs; Decrypted data never appears in direct database read logs
  task-link-repo-uniqueness-constraint [low]: Create and enforce a unique constraint or index on the slug column in the mappings table to prevent duplicate slug storage.
    Component: comp-link-mapping-repository, Responsibility: Ensures every stored slug in the mappings table is unique with no duplicates.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: The database migration creates a unique index on the slug column; Inserting a duplicate slug triggers a unique constraint violation
  task-purger-storage-cleanup [medium]: Create the service that purges valid deletion requests from Sharers from persistent storage and ephemeral cache within the 24-hour window.
    Component: comp-delete-purger, Responsibility: Purge valid deletion requests from Sharers from persistent storage and ephemeral cache.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Expired deletion requests are removed from both persistent storage and cache; The purger respects the 24-hour window constraint
  task-gdpr-export-data-retrieval [high]: Develop the logic that retrieves 100% of stored link data for a requesting user for GDPR Right to Access requests without data loss.
    Component: comp-gdpr-exporter, Responsibility: Exports 100% of stored link data for a requesting user for GDPR Right to Access requests.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: The export job returns all data associated with the requested user identity; Exported data is complete and includes zero missing records
  task-platform-audit-log-ingestion [medium]: Create the service that emits structured JSON logs to stdout and manages retention for a minimum of 365 days.
    Component: comp-platform-audit, Responsibility: Emits structured JSON logs to stdout for ingestion by platform, retaining audit logs for a minimum of 365 days.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Logs are emitted as JSON objects to stdout with ISO8601 timestamps; Logs are retained in the audit store for 365 days
  task-backup-engine-replication-job [medium]: Develop the logic to execute daily automated backups and replicate them to disaster recovery storage with zero integrity errors.
    Component: comp-backup-replication-engine, Responsibility: Execute daily automated backups and replicate with zero integrity errors to disaster recovery storage.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Backup replication jobs complete successfully without integrity errors; Replicated data matches source data at the byte level
  task-backup-engine-checksum-verification [low]: Create the verification service that checks backup checksums before committing replication tasks to ensure data integrity.
    Component: comp-backup-replication-engine, Responsibility: Verify backup checksums before committing replication tasks to ensure data integrity.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: ["task-backup-engine-replication-job"]
    Completion criteria: Replication tasks are only committed if checksums match; Mismatched checksums fail the replication job gracefully
  task-failure-detection-event-ingestion [medium]: Develop the handler that ingests events from platform-fault-tolerance to identify regional failure conditions.
    Component: comp-failure-detection, Responsibility: Ingest events from platform-fault-tolerance to identify regional failure conditions.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Fault events are ingested and stored in the failure event table; The handler correctly maps events to specific regions
  task-failure-detection-recovery-trigger [medium]: Create the logic that raises a recovery-trigger event upon detecting a failure state impacting the RTO.
    Component: comp-failure-detection, Responsibility: Raise recovery-trigger event upon detecting RTO-impacting failure state.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: ["task-failure-detection-event-ingestion"]
    Completion criteria: RTO-impacting failures emit the recovery-trigger event immediately; The event payload includes the detected region and severity
  task-recovery-planner-topology-resolution [medium]: Develop the resolver that identifies required endpoints by resolving region topology from the link-mapping-repository.
    Component: comp-recovery-planner, Responsibility: Resolve region topology from link-mapping-repository to identify required endpoints.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: The resolver returns valid endpoints for a given region ID; Topology data is sourced correctly from the link-mapping-repository
  task-recovery-planner-sequence-generation [medium]: Create the generator that creates a state-restoration sequence plan targeting specific regional endpoints.
    Component: comp-recovery-planner, Responsibility: Generate state-restoration sequence plan targeting specific regional endpoints.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: ["task-recovery-planner-topology-resolution"]
    Completion criteria: The plan includes a deterministic sequence of endpoint restoration steps; The sequence is generated within the required RTO window
  task-timeout-enforcer-intercept [medium]: Develop the middleware that intercepts incoming requests and enforces configured timeout limits.
    Component: comp-request-timeout-enforcer, Responsibility: Intercept incoming requests and enforce configured timeout limits.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Requests exceeding the timeout limit are terminated; The middleware returns appropriate HTTP headers for timeouts
  task-timeout-enforcer-termination [medium]: Create the handler that terminates long-running requests safely without dropping connections abruptly.
    Component: comp-request-timeout-enforcer, Responsibility: Terminate long-running requests safely without dropping connections abruptly.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Long-running requests are terminated via graceful cancellation signals; Connection cleanup occurs without socket errors
  task-latency-monitor-prometheus [low]: Develop the logic to monitor redirect endpoint latency P95 via Prometheus histograms to ensure latency remains within 100 ms.
    Component: comp-rel-latency-monitor, Responsibility: Monitor redirect endpoint latency P95 via Prometheus histograms to ensure latency remains within 100 ms.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Latency metrics are exposed to Prometheus with P95 histograms; Alerts are generated when P95 exceeds 100 ms
  task-uptime-verifier-probes [medium]: Create the service that verifies monthly uptime for the redirect endpoint via synthetic probes to ensure verified uptime ≥ 99.9%.
    Component: comp-rel-uptime-verifier, Responsibility: Verify monthly uptime for redirect endpoint via synthetic probes to ensure verified uptime ≥ 99.9%.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Synthetic probes are executed according to the monthly schedule; Uptime metrics are aggregated to reflect ≥ 99.9% availability
  task-validation-engine-malicious [high]: Develop the validation engine that validates and rejects malicious or invalid requests to prevent processing.
    Component: comp-sec-request-validation, Responsibility: Validate and reject malicious or invalid requests to prevent processing.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Malicious payloads are identified and requests are rejected with 400/403; Threat indicators are checked with latency ≤ 5 seconds
  task-validation-engine-storage [medium]: Create the logic that blocks malicious URL submissions before storage in the content repository.
    Component: comp-sec-request-validation, Responsibility: Block malicious URL submissions before storage in content repository.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: Malicious URLs are rejected at the storage interface before persistence; Attempted storage of malicious URLs logs an event
  task-transport-enforcer-https [medium]: Develop the middleware that enforces HTTPS transport layer, injects HSTS headers, and redirects HTTP requests.
    Component: comp-sec-transport-enforcer, Responsibility: Enforce HTTPS transport layer, inject HSTS headers, and redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: HTTP requests are redirected to HTTPS with a 301 status code; HSTS headers are present in all HTTPS responses
  task-transport-enforcer-secure-channel [medium]: Create the logic that validates incoming requests originate from SecureChannel.
    Component: comp-sec-transport-enforcer, Responsibility: Validate incoming requests originate from SecureChannel.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: ["task-transport-enforcer-https"]
    Completion criteria: Requests from non-SecureChannel origins are rejected; Validation logic correctly identifies SecureChannel handshake state
  task-shutdown-coordinator-signals [medium]: Develop the handler that manages signal listeners to initiate resource cleanup before process termination.
    Component: graceful-shutdown-coordinator, Responsibility: Manage signal listeners to initiate resource cleanup before process termination.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: []
    Completion criteria: The process listens for termination signals and initiates cleanup; Active connections are closed before the process exits
  task-shutdown-coordinator-drain [low]: Create the logic that ensures no new requests are accepted during the drain window.
    Component: graceful-shutdown-coordinator, Responsibility: Ensure no new requests are accepted during the drain window.
    Backing tool: claude_code_cli
    Dependencies: ["task-shutdown-coordinator-signals"]
    Completion criteria: New requests are rejected during the configured drain window; The drain window duration is configurable and enforced
template_variables.component_model_summary:
7 Components:
  sec-validation-gateway: SecurityValidationGateway (domain: JC:Security-Validation-Gateway)
    Responsibilities:
    SEC-VAL-01: Validates and rejects malicious or invalid requests to prevent processing.
    SEC-VAL-02: Enforces HTTPS transport layer with HSTS headers and HTTP redirection.
    SEC-VAL-03: Blocks threat indicators within 5 seconds latency to prevent harmful submissions.
    SEC-VAL-04: Enforces rate limit of 1000 requests per IP per rolling 60-second window.
    SEC-VAL-05: Blocks malicious URL submissions before storage in content repository.
    Dependencies: platform-fault-tolerance (resilience), platform-audit (logging)
  link-mapping-repository: LinkMappingRepository (domain: JC:Link-Lifecycle-Engine)
    Responsibilities:
    LINK-REP-01: Performs successful mapping lookup for valid slug, returning encrypted payload metadata and target destination.
    LINK-REP-02: Stores original URLs encrypted at rest using AES-256 cipher suite with zero plaintext occurrence in direct reads.
    LINK-REP-03: Ensures every stored slug in the mappings table is unique with no duplicates.
    Dependencies: platform-disaster-recovery (recovery), platform-observability (metrics)
  link-lifecycle-processor: LinkLifecycleProcessor (domain: JC:Link-Lifecycle-Engine)
    Responsibilities:
    LINK-LIF-01: Purges valid deletion requests from Sharers from persistent storage and ephemeral cache.
    LINK-LIF-02: Exports 100% of stored link data for a requesting user for GDPR Right to Access requests.
    LINK-LIF-03: Generates notification attempts for every policy-expiry event before the expiry timestamp.
    Dependencies: link-mapping-repository (data)
  platform-observability: ReliabilityObservability (domain: JC:Platform-Reliability-Operations)
    Responsibilities:
    PLATFORM-OB-01: Monitors redirect endpoint latency P95 via Prometheus histograms to ensure latency remains within 100 ms.
    PLATFORM-OB-02: Verifies monthly uptime for redirect endpoint via synthetic probes to ensure verified uptime ≥ 99.9%.
    Dependencies: link-mapping-repository (endpoint)
  platform-audit: ReliabilityAudit (domain: JC:Platform-Reliability-Operations)
    Responsibilities:
    PLATFORM-LOG-01: Emits structured JSON logs to stdout for ingestion by platform, retaining audit logs for a minimum of 365 days.
    Dependencies: security-validation-gateway (events), link-mapping-repository (events)
  platform-disaster-recovery: ReliabilityDisasterRecovery (domain: JC:Platform-Reliability-Operations)
    Responsibilities:
    PLATFORM-DR-01: Achieves Recovery Time Objective (RTO) on full regional failure requiring restoration within 15 minutes.
    PLATFORM-DR-02: Executes daily automated backups and replicates with zero integrity errors to disaster recovery storage.
    Dependencies: link-mapping-repository (backup_source)
  platform-fault-tolerance: ReliabilityFaultTolerance (domain: JC:Platform-Reliability-Operations)
    Responsibilities:
    PLATFORM-FT-01: Handles timeout conditions without triggering service crashes.
    Dependencies: none

test_cases.expected_outcome: System rejects malicious payload in request body and returns HTTP 400 Bad Request within 500ms latency.
HTTP 301 Redirect is returned with HSTS header for non-HTTPS requests; Rate limit of 1000 req/IP/60s is enforced.
Malformed URL submissions are rejected at storage interface with event logged; 403 Forbidden response returned.
Valid slug returns encrypted payload metadata and target destination URL; Unique constraint violation returned for duplicate slug.
New URL records stored as encrypted blobs; Direct database reads do not display plaintext URL values.
Valid deletion requests are purged from persistent storage and ephemeral cache within the 24-hour window.
Export job returns 100% of stored link data for requested user identity; Zero missing records in export payload.
Notification attempts are triggered for every policy-expiry event before the expiry timestamp.
Latency metrics exposed to Prometheus with P95 histograms; Alerts configuration loaded successfully.
Synthetic probes executed according to monthly schedule; Uptime metrics aggregated for reporting.
Logs emitted as JSON objects to stdout with ISO8601 timestamps; Audit data retained for 365 days.
Regional failure events ingested and mapped correctly; Recovery trigger events emitted immediately.
Backup replication jobs complete without integrity errors; Replicated data matches source data at the byte level.
Timeout conditions handled without triggering service crashes; Graceful termination of long-running requests.
